---
id: application-notification

description: "Notify partner about changes in application."

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Application notification"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/{application.merchantUrls.notificationEndpoint}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Notify partner about changes in application.
We use this resource when there is need to let you know about important changes within particular application. Namely in following situations:

| Trigger | Corresponding Application.stateReason | Expected reaction |
| ------- | ------------------------------------- | ----------------- |
| Application was approved (approval process is proceeding correctly) | PROCESSING_APPROVED | Do not cancel customer's order prematurely |
| Application was rejected | REJECTED | You should probably cancel respective order and release reserved goods |
| Application was cancelled (before delivery) | CANCELLED_NOT_PAID | You should probably cancel respective order and release reserved goods |
| Order to dispatch (we commit to finance customer's order) | READY_TO_SHIP | Dispatch the order to the customer |
| Application is going to be paid out | READY_PAID | Wait for us processing financial compensation with you |

We fill the request with at least following information:

- Application unique ID
- Application state
- Application substate
- Down payment
- Timestamp of the notification
- Hashed message (check sum)

> USEFUL NOTE: If you think it takes us unusually long time to send you particular notification, do not hesitate to use `/financing/v1/applications/{applicationId}` resource (where `{applicationId}` is the application ID you received in the response of `/financing/v1/applications` after its creation) to directly find out information you seek.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Primary identifier of the application"},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED","CANCELED"],"description":"Status of the application"},"stateReason":{"enum":["PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_SIGNED","READY_TO_SHIP","READY_SHIPPED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_DELIVERED","READY_PAID","REJECTED","CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED"]},"orderNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Order number (internal for e-shop)"},"notificationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Time when notification was created (uses [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) formatting)"},"orderState":{"type":"string","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","PAID","CANCELLED","TERMINATED"],"description":"Status of the Order"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (150000 represents 1 500) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Current down payment set by a customer"},"sendDate":{"type":"string","description":"Time when notification was created (uses [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) formatting)"},"sequenceNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Notification sequence number"},"checkSum":{"type":"string","description":"Message checksum - result of HMAC with SHA512 (secret key is used)"}},"required":["id","state","stateReason","orderNumber","notificationDate","orderState","downPayment","sentDate","checkSum","sequenceNumber"],"example":{"id":"01-11200a0ee1","state":"PROCESSING","stateReason":"PROCESSING_APPROVED","orderNumber":"AA234","notificationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","orderState":"PROCESSING","downPayment":{"value":300000,"currency":"CZK"},"sequenceNumber":1,"sentDate":"2017-07-16T00:00:00+02:00","checksum":"443E150D3406F6A8DC62C1DB224AFDD84FA9907071BB1AD9B2C7701031793662191501B26AADF3A31361341EA176C80B23D8A9A5E5B5219538289945FE0C20A7"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","example":"OK"}}},"example":{"status":"OK"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request","headers":{}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
